channel.title: conda on Mooners
channel.description: Recent content in conda on Mooners

item.title: Conda使用指南（安装部署篇）
item.description: 关于 Conda Conda is an open source package management system and environment management system that runs on Windows, macOS and Linux. Conda quickly installs, runs and updates packages and their dependencies. Conda easily creates, saves, loads and switches between environments on your local computer. It was created for Python programs, but it can package and distribute software for any language. 简单来说，Conda 就是专门用于管理 Python 包环境以及部署的工具。 Anaconda、
